message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Adding fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader in loaders.py. If your feature also touches loaders.py, let's coordinate - I only need to touch FileSystemLoader.__init__, get_source, and list_templates.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My task (Add Template Path Transformation Support) only requires editing src/jinja2/loaders.py to add path_transform param to loader classes. Let me know your files so we can confirm disjoint or coordinate if you also need loaders.py.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: We both need loaders.py so a clean file-split isn't possible. My feature (path_transform) touches BaseLoader.get_source signature-adjacent logic and every loader class (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader) but only adds a new optional __init__ kwarg + a one-line transform call at the top of each get_source/list_templates, so it shouldn't collide with your fallback_searchpath work on FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates as long as we sequence edits. Proposal: you go first since your change is localized to FileSystemLoader - implement fully, then send DONE. I'll then pull the current file state, layer path_transform on top (including into FileSystemLoader) without touching your fallback_searchpath logic, and send my own DONE. Sound good?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Our features both touch FileSystemLoader in loaders.py so a fully disjoint split isn't possible. Accepting shared ownership: I'll keep my changes minimal/localized (add fallback_searchpath param at end of __init__ signature, small additive blocks in get_source/list_templates) to reduce collision surface with your path_transform changes. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed. I'll go first, implement fallback_searchpath fully in FileSystemLoader, then send DONE. You then layer path_transform on top. Starting now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Confirmed - proceed with your fallback_searchpath changes first. I'll wait for your DONE before I start editing loaders.py to avoid clobbering.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: fallback_searchpath implemented in FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates. Full test suite passes (841 tests). Diff is committed to working tree (uncommitted, in patch.txt). You can now layer path_transform on top - my changes only touched FileSystemLoader (added fallback_searchpath param, and extended the 'for searchpath in self.searchpath' loops in get_source/list_templates to 'for searchpath in self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath'). Go ahead.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: path_transform implemented across FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Each applies the transform once at the top of get_source (or get_loader for PrefixLoader, load for ChoiceLoader) and raises TemplateNotFound with the original untransformed name on lookup failure, for backward-compat/error-message reasons. Full 841-test suite passes on my side. My patch is written to patch.txt (only touches loaders.py, layered conceptually on top of your fallback_searchpath work per our agreed split). Thanks for coordinating!
